sql_array:
CREATE TABLE LEADS (
  ORG_ID      integer not null,
  LEAD_ID     integer not null,
  FREETEXT_ID integer not null,
  SUBJECT     varchar (255),
  NAME_FIRST  varchar (30),
  NAME_LAST   varchar (30),
  TITLE       varchar (255),
  primary key (ORG_ID, LEAD_ID));
INSERT INTO LEADS (ORG_ID, LEAD_ID, FREETEXT_ID, SUBJECT, NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST, TITLE) VALUES (1, 1, 1, 'Initial Entry', 'John', 'Doe', 'First Title');
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM LEADS WHERE FREETEXT_ID > 0);
SELECT vt_batch_feed_offband (vtb, serialize (vector (SELECT ORG_ID FROM LEADS WHERE FREETEXT_ID = 1)), 0) FROM LEADS;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEADS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM LEADS WHERE TITLE IS NOT NULL AND SUBJECT IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE TEMP_LEADS AS SELECT * FROM LEADS WHERE LEAD_ID = 1;
INSERT INTO TEMP_LEADS SELECT * FROM LEADS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM LEADS WHERE ORG_ID = 1);
SELECT vt_batch_feed_offband(vtb, serialize(vector(1)), 1) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM LEADS WHERE TITLE = 'First Title');
CREATE TABLE JOIN_TEST AS SELECT a.ORG_ID, a.LEAD_ID, b.ORG_ID AS JOIN_ORG FROM LEADS a JOIN LEADS b ON a.LEAD_ID = b.LEAD_ID WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM LEADS WHERE a.SUBJECT IS NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO LEADS (ORG_ID, LEAD_ID, FREETEXT_ID, SUBJECT, NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST, TITLE) VALUES (2, 2, 2, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) RETURNING vt_batch_feed_offband(vtb, serialize(vector(2)), 0);
SELECT FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME FROM LEADS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM LEADS WHERE FREETEXT_ID BETWEEN 1 AND 2) GROUP BY FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT FREETEXT_ID) > 1;
